_meta.author: dev.yadhakim
_meta.title: Elegant Carousel
_meta.description: An editorial-style image carousel with a split-panel layout — text content on the left, full-bleed imagery on the right. Features smooth cross-fade transitions, a Ken Burns zoom effect on images, auto-advancing progress indicators with per-slide labels, decorative frame corners, and touch/swipe support. Ideal for fashion lookbooks, portfolio showcases, or luxury brand storytelling.
